schema_version: v0 — skill-charter shape; migrates into the intention envelope when MAP.md Q6 lands
what: The resolution pivot: assert the points are wrapped → run the inward completeness check → cast the node (type it + bind its class's gates) → spawn children and/or reach an escalation → resolve (survivors file to CairnCommons). Casting lives here; there is no separate /ticket.
why: This is where open thinking becomes structure — the whole point of the resolver being spent on the novel and never on re-deriving the settled (Law 1). The inward completeness check is the second feedback loop (proof-on-close's front door): an incomplete node is caught before cost is spent building it. Casting binds workflow to node-class here, once, so the ticket artifact is workflow-neutral (everybody has tickets) and the node's state IS the pipeline instance (no orchestrator holds a second copy to drift).
invoke: /sorted  (when the points in hand feel wrapped and you're ready to resolve)
state: v0 — first cast 2026-07-15. A resolver-occupied nexus; the role-replacement staircase applies (intention extraction + decomposition are scaffolded here first).

nexus.note: SKILL.md carries the live sequence + question set; this is the charter-face record.
nexus.routes_forward: cast + filed → build under the bound gates → prove
nexus.routes_back: completeness red → design; can't resolve → an escalation (never a dead end)

casting.types: node-class charters in CairnCommons/node_classes/ (skill, concept-piece, code-seam, …); an absent class needed is a demand to write it
casting.variable: which gate / which check-type (proof gate / derivation gate / signature gate)

traces_to: Law 1 (novel not settled — resolution becomes structure)
Law 8 (nothing enters proven-space without a real proof)
Law 3 (nothing known until measured — the completeness check)
owner: the skills charter gates writes; Akien ratifies changes (signature gate)
proof: skill node → done only when cairnmap recompiles green (derivation gate). IOU until cairnmap exists — tracked in proofs/.
provenance: converged in the founding design conversation; absorbed the old /ticket and /outcome (MAP.md 'Workflow + starting skills', 2026-07-15).
